name: document-management — Add document creation to /vault explorer
objective: The /vault page is read-only: it lists .md files from the vault root but has no way to create new ones. This workstream adds a 'New Document' flow: a simple form (title + optional content) that writes a .md file directly into the vault root directory, then refreshes the list.
exit_criteria: POST /api/vault/documents accepts { title, content? } and writes a .md file to the vault root (not to vault/shared/).
File name is derived from the title (slug + .md), with a collision suffix if needed.
GET /api/vault/documents response includes the new file immediately after creation.
The /vault page has a 'New Document' button that opens an inline form with title + optional content textarea.
After successful creation the form closes and the document list refreshes.
